interaction_phrase: to provide Poznań Supercomputing and Networking Center with first quantum computers
occurrence_sentence: ORCA Computing has been selected by the Poznań Supercomputing and Networking Center (PSNC) to provide two ORCA Computing PT-1 quantum photonics systems.

interaction_phrase: to provide Poznań Supercomputing and Networking Center with first quantum computers
occurrence_sentence: The systems will be installed at the PSNC's high-performance computing data center located in Poznań, Poland.

Funded under the Polish program, the systems will be installed at the PSNC's high-performance computing data center located in Poznań, Poland and will accelerate its work in quantum computing across a range of scientific and application areas including biology, chemistry and machine learning.
The systems will be installed at the PSNC's high-performance computing data center located in Poznań, Poland.

Funded under the Polish program, the systems will be installed at the PSNC's high-performance computing data center located in Poznań, Poland and will accelerate its work in quantum computing across a range of scientific and application areas including biology, chemistry and machine learning.
PT-1 systems have been procured under EUROHPC-PL project and will be installed at the PSNC data center in November and December 2023.

interaction_phrase: will be installed at the PSNC data center
occurrence_sentence: PT-1 systems have been procured under EUROHPC-PL project and will be installed at the PSNC data center in November and December 2023.

interaction_phrase: will be integrated with classical HPC systems and workloads in PSNC quantum computing and quantum communication environment
occurrence_sentence: Two ORCA systems will be integrated with classical HPC systems and workloads in PSNC quantum computing and quantum communication environment.

interaction_phrase: will be used as advanced quantum accelerators integrated with classical EuroHPC-PL environment
occurrence_sentence: Under EuroHPC-PL project ORCA systems will be used as advanced quantum accelerators integrated with classical EuroHPC-PL environment.

interaction_phrase: PSNC will integrate ORCA systems with other quantum computing technologies and environments
occurrence_sentence: PSNC will integrate ORCA systems with other quantum computing technologies and environments.
